articles.title: Tennis star Mirra Andreeva erupts with profanity-laced tirade toward fans after Indian Wells defeat - Fox News
articles.description: Mirra Andreeva flung her racket and screamed profanities at fans following her loss at Indian Wells, later expressing regret for her on-court outburst.
articles.content:
Tennis star Mirra Andreeva had a total meltdown on the court after losing to Katerina Siniakova 4-6, 7-6 (5), 6-3 in the Round of 32 at Indian Wells in Coachella Valley on Monday.
